summary: Completed second iteration testing of AI Course Builder. Frontend works well, authentication/routing works, but AI course generation still fails due to Emergent LLM service 502 errors. The retry logic fix WAS implemented and is working, but the underlying AI service connectivity issue remains unresolved.

critical_bugs.issue: AI course generation fails with 502 Bad Gateway from Emergent LLM service after all retry attempts
critical_bugs.impact: Blocks core feature - users cannot create courses via AI
critical_bugs.details: Backend logs show retry logic IS working (attempts 1, 2, 3) but all fail with 'litellm.BadGatewayError: BadGatewayError: OpenAIException - Error code: 502'. Issue is with Emergent LLM service availability, not the retry implementation.

critical_bugs.issue: Intermittent timeout issues with API calls from frontend
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend authentication checks sometimes fail, causing loading states
critical_bugs.details: Some API calls succeed (visible in logs) but frontend experiences timeouts. Possible network latency or service load issues.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Intermittent timeouts from frontend, but successful calls visible in backend logs
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Frontend gets stuck in loading state

ui_bugs.issue: Pages stuck on loading spinner due to failed API authentication calls
ui_bugs.details: Frontend correctly navigates to protected routes and attempts authentication, but gets stuck waiting for backend response

integration_issues.issue: Frontend auth checks fail with 'TypeError: Failed to fetch' due to backend connectivity

passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status (with 3-4s latency)
Landing page loads perfectly with all UI elements and proper styling
Hero section, features section, and CTA section display correctly
Frontend routing works correctly - navigates to /dashboard with session token
Authentication logic flows correctly (reaches right pages)
Course generation retry logic IS implemented and working (visible in logs)
Backend logs show successful API calls for auth and courses intermittently
Existing test session token is valid and recognized
Existing 'Basic Python Loops for Beginners' course found in database
Frontend code quality and structure excellent
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing

success_percentage.backend: 30% (Health works, auth works intermittently, AI generation completely fails)
success_percentage.frontend: 80% (UI perfect, routing works, but backend integration fails)
success_percentage.authentication: 70% (Session handling works, but API calls timeout)
success_percentage.ai_generation: 0% (Retry logic implemented correctly but Emergent LLM service returns 502)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: The retry logic fix WAS successfully implemented and is working (visible in backend logs showing retry attempts 1, 2, 3). However, the root cause remains: Emergent LLM service is returning 502 Bad Gateway errors. Need to investigate: 1) Emergent LLM API key validity (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY), 2) Emergent LLM service availability, 3) LiteLLM configuration. Also address intermittent connectivity causing frontend timeouts.
